channel.title: Ramy Abou Naccoul on LMI
channel.description: Recent content in Ramy Abou Naccoul on LMI

item.title: Elimination of Tar in Biomass Gasification Process: Liquid-LiquidEquilibrium of Ternary Systems Water plus Solvent (p-Xylene and MethylHexadecanoate) plus Model Molecules of Tar (Thiophene, Pyridine,Naphthalene, Phenathrene, and Anthracene)
